On Thu, Jul 06, 2000 at 03:45:23AM +0200, cj@vallcom.net wrote:
> BWap has changed its name to TekNap and BWap is now obsolete.
> therefore this is a new port I guess, but in this case I wasn't sure if I was going to make a
> diff or a shar. 

Satoshi, please perform a repository copy from audio/bwap to
audio/teknap for me so I can do the upgrade in place.
